no: EET compatible (GAME_IS ~bg2ee eet~). V1.7 installed, v1.8 available (Chinese translation update only). German is language 0, English is language 1 — l:1 required. Single component mod. Requires BG2:EE or EET patched to 2.0+. Adds new quest areas with worldmap entries, challenging encounters, and lore about a mad deity.
sum: BG2 quest mod with a storyline about a mad deity. Adds new areas, a dungeon, and challenging encounters.

co.tp2n: Throne of the Mad God V 1.7
co.no: Confront a mad god in a pocket plane dungeon.
